title: sarcochilus hillii
intro: Sarcochilus hillii, also known as the Hill's orchid, is a species of orchid native to Queensland, Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for fever and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The plant is used to improve circulation, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain, offering various health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and reduced inflammation. Sarcochilus hillii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
